# @platform/worker-runtime

DEPRECATED (ADR-0006 / ADR-ACT-0288): superseded by apps/platform-api server/worker-registry.ts + usecases/webhook-worker.ts; do not add new usage; removal review 2026-12-18. Background worker runtime: job queue consumption, retry policy, concurrency control, and worker lifecycle management.

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: deprecation-review
Promotion eligible: false
Semver policy: deprecated
```

## Responsibilities

- Own the background worker process lifecycle (start, drain, shutdown)
- Register and dispatch job processors by queue name
- Apply retry, backoff, and dead-letter policy per job type
- Emit observability signals and audit events for job execution

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not define domain logic executed inside jobs
- Does not own queue topology or broker configuration (queue-runtime)
- Does not interact with HTTP request/response cycle

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Imported by application packages to start background worker processes
- Job processor functions are registered from feature or domain packages

application
```

contract

feature

config-service

audit-service
```

## Operational notes

- Graceful shutdown drains in-flight jobs before exiting
- Dead-letter queues require monitoring alerts wired via observability package
